specific_question: How many assignment criteria and average weekly lead assignments were processed by the Elexion Automotive CRM, and what was the acceptance rate?
answer: In 2022, Amanda Lee set up the CRM to automatically assign leads to sales representatives on 12 different criteria, including geography, product interest, and lead score.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
